questions.question: Should Relay directly depend on Effect Workflow internals from `.effect/packages/effect/src`, or should the ticket focus on designing a Relay-native workflow layer inspired by that code?
questions.answer: no, the .effect is a clone fo the source to use as reference only

questions.question: Which ticket lifecycle operations are highest priority for the first implementation: pause/resume, validated status transitions, retry/recovery, or workflow inspection?
